results.text: export async function createUser(email: string, password: string, name: string) {
const user = await createUser(email, password, name);

input.name: context-gatherer
input.prompt: Analyze the user registration flow to identify any other endpoints that might need similar input validation. Look at routes, middleware, and service layers.
input.explanation: Finding other endpoints that need validation

output.response:
Found 3 additional endpoints without input validation:
1. POST /api/profile/update - accepts unvalidated name, bio, avatar fields
2. PUT /api/settings - accepts unvalidated theme, language preferences
3. POST /api/feedback - accepts unvalidated message and rating fields

output.message: I've added Zod-based input validation to the registration endpoint. All tests pass. I also identified 3 other endpoints that could benefit from similar validation: /api/profile/update, /api/settings, and /api/feedback. Would you like me to add validation to those as well?
